activities.obj: Design and document the architecture for a new mid-sized application.
activities.desc: Lead the architectural design of a real project module, producing diagrams, technology choices, and trade-off analyses.

activities.obj: Learn architectural decision-making from senior architects.
activities.desc: Participate in architecture review boards and pair with a senior architect during design sessions.

activities.obj: Understand core architectural patterns and principles.
activities.desc: Complete a course on software architecture patterns (microservices, event-driven, layered) and read "Software Architecture: The Hard Parts."

activities.obj: Identify and remediate security vulnerabilities in an existing codebase.
activities.desc: Perform a security audit on a live application, fix findings, and implement secure coding fixes.

activities.obj: Build security awareness through peer collaboration.
activities.desc: Join a security-focused community of practice and conduct threat-modeling sessions with the team.

activities.obj: Master OWASP Top 10 and secure development principles.
activities.desc: Complete an OWASP/secure-coding certification course.

activities.obj: Improve measurable performance of a slow application feature.
activities.desc: Profile a real application, identify bottlenecks, and optimize queries, caching, and front-end load times.

activities.obj: Exchange optimization techniques with experienced engineers.
activities.desc: Shadow a performance engineer and present optimization results in a tech-share session.

activities.obj: Learn profiling tools and performance fundamentals.
activities.desc: Take a course on web performance (Core Web Vitals, database tuning).

activities.obj: Lead a small team through a project delivery.
activities.desc: Act as tech lead on a feature, owning technical decisions and coordinating the team.

activities.obj: Develop mentoring and coaching skills.
activities.desc: Mentor a junior developer and seek feedback from your own manager or a senior leader.

activities.obj: Understand leadership and communication frameworks.
activities.desc: Complete a technical leadership or engineering management course.

activities.obj: Build and manage a CI/CD pipeline.
activities.desc: Set up automated build, test, and deployment pipelines for a real project.

activities.obj: Learn deployment practices from DevOps peers.
activities.desc: Pair with a DevOps engineer and participate in incident retrospectives.

activities.obj: Understand CI/CD and infrastructure-as-code fundamentals.
activities.desc: Complete a Docker/Kubernetes or CI/CD certification course.

activities.obj: Plan and estimate a full project or sprint.
activities.desc: Own the estimation and breakdown of work for a real deliverable and track actuals against estimates.

activities.obj: Improve estimation accuracy through team input.
activities.desc: Facilitate planning poker sessions and review estimation outcomes with the team.

activities.obj: Learn estimation techniques and agile planning.
activities.desc: Take a course on agile project management or estimation methods.

activities.obj: Increase test coverage and quality on a project.
activities.desc: Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for a real feature and set up automated testing.

activities.obj: Learn testing strategies from QA peers.
activities.desc: Collaborate with QA engineers on test plans and review each other's test cases.

activities.obj: Understand testing methodologies and frameworks.
activities.desc: Complete a course on test automation (Jest, Cypress, Playwright).

activities.obj: Design and build a production-ready API.
activities.desc: Create a RESTful or GraphQL API with proper versioning, documentation, and error handling for a real project.

activities.obj: Refine API design through peer review.
activities.desc: Conduct API design reviews and collaborate with consuming teams on contracts.

activities.obj: Learn API design best practices and standards.
activities.desc: Take a course on REST/GraphQL design and OpenAPI specification.

activities.obj: Design and optimize a database schema.
activities.desc: Model a database for a real application, write migrations, and tune indexes and queries.

activities.obj: Learn database management from experienced DBAs.
activities.desc: Pair with a DBA on schema reviews and discuss scaling strategies.

activities.obj: Understand relational and NoSQL fundamentals.
activities.desc: Complete a course on database design and SQL performance tuning.

activities.obj: Deploy and manage an application on a cloud platform.
activities.desc: Provision and configure cloud infrastructure (compute, storage, networking) for a live workload.

activities.obj: Build cloud expertise through community learning.
activities.desc: Join a cloud user group and pair with a cloud engineer on architecture decisions.

activities.obj: Earn foundational cloud knowledge.
activities.desc: Complete a cloud certification (AWS Solutions Architect Associate, Azure Fundamentals).
